items.description: Ford plans to embed Apple Maps directly into its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform, which will start with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck set for release in 2027. In an announcement on Thursday, Ford says it will use Apple Maps to offer "turn-by-turn directions using natural language, real-time tra...

items.title: Amazon’s best 4K streaming sticks are up to 40 percent off
items.description: There’s no shortage of great shows and movies to watch, but discovering something new isn’t always easy. items.title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders
items.description: Xbox Insiders can stream games from their libraries for free in ad-supported streaming sessions starting today. The free streaming sessions are limited to games you already own, and sessions are capped at one hour. However, ads will only play "before sessions begin." It's also optional - you won't n...

items.title: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
items.description: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an "AI Kill Switch Act" that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico. Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the ...

items.description: Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future. items.title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
items.description: It's impossible to talk about a new Xbox game without also talking about the state of Xbox. items.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
items.description: The European Union has fined Google's parent company Alphabet €890 million (about $1 billion) for two separate violations of the bloc's Digital Markets Act (DMA). One penalty is for giving its own products preferential treatment in search results, while the other is for blocking Android developers f...
